title: Minecraft Dungeons Weapons
description: Adding Weapon Textures and Models from Minecraft Dungeons to the Vanilla Game.
body:
# Weapons

In this pack you get some really cool textures from Minecraft Dungeons for Minecraft Java Edition!
There are also all the unique Weapons, which you can get by renaming diamond or netherite swords or axes. The bows and crossbows work just the same as the swords.

### MCD Blocks
I made an extra pack to retexture some blocks in the Minecraft Dungeons style, check the versions page to see it!

Get a quick overview in this video from 11:47 to 15:33:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QVHNhv8FHGo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## A list of all items, their names and paths can be found [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/10vh6PixK4lMQo972EWwIqNBVeetLTFNvUhUwRdU56KI/edit?usp=sharing)
The Shields, Bows and Crossbows don't work with the vanilla renaming method yet, I'll add support for them in the future. You can get them with a command though.
They also have no animation for charging up yet.

## Since 1.21.5:
You can get the items via commands or by renaming them. That way you don't need mods like OptiFine or CIT anymore.
The namespace for all items is "mcd".

An example for the give-command would be: 
```
/give @p minecraft:netherite_sword[minecraft:item_model="mcd:swords/heartstealer",minecraft:item_name='"Heartstealer"']
```

Here's a list with all items and their folders. If you have any questions you can visit my [discord](https://discord.gg/ejBJJSr).

## Colabs
### Fabric Mod
I've worked together with [chronos_sacaria](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/chronos_sacaria/projects) to create an incredible cool fabric mod, that brings all the weapons with crafting recipes to you world! Go check him and the mod out on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mcdw)!
He developed the mod further for more weapons and reached millions downloads already!

## Credits
If you're making a video with this pack, you must link this page and give credit to Kai1907 and Shadow_236. If you use chronos_sacaria's mod you must credit him appropriately.  

If you have any feedback, feel free to join my Discord and let me know.
Make sure to check out my other packs on my Modrinth profile as well :D  

Have fun playing!
